response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership, distributed systems architecture, or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven experience in building scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems leadership
No clear track record of technical leadership mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
